title: List and Organize Sessions by Date

findings.description: Date group headers (TODAY, YESTERDAY, THIS WEEK) are present and visible
findings.actual: Three date groups displayed as uppercase labels

findings.description: Sessions appear chronologically ordered within each group (newest first)
findings.actual: Sessions ordered by recency within each group

findings.description: Some Mar 21 sessions appear under TODAY instead of YESTERDAY
findings.expected: All Mar 21 sessions should be under YESTERDAY (today is Mar 22)
findings.actual: Mar 21 at 9:15 PM and 9:09 PM are under TODAY; Mar 21 at 2:53 PM etc. are under YESTERDAY

findings.description: Only 3 date groups available with no further granularity for older sessions
findings.expected: Additional groups like LAST WEEK, THIS MONTH, OLDER for better organization
findings.actual: All sessions older than yesterday fall under THIS WEEK
